songs.title: Sports car
feed: “Sports car” by Tate McRae spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Sports car” by Tate McRae is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 22 sales units.
“Sports car” by Tate McRae is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 31 streams units.
“Sports car” by Tate McRae is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
“Sports car” by Tate McRae is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 476,035 total units.
